title: Greater Pipe Manifest
description: Curated, opinionated knowledge bundle (a 'Pipe') consumable by the Greater shell. The FOSS shell is fully functional without any Pipe; loading a Pipe transforms it into 'Greater mode' for a particular persona.

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in the chat header and Pipe status panel.

version.description: SemVer string. The Greater shell does not interpret it; it is shown verbatim in the status panel.

persona.description: Which Greater demo persona this Pipe applies to. The runtime registry matches Pipes to demo routes by persona.

id.description: Bias tag matching the chunk-level `bias` field (e.g. 'neutral', 'core', 'knots').

label.description: Short label rendered in the segmented control.

description.description: One-sentence explanation of this bias's perspective, shown in the Pipe status panel.

path.description: Path to the bundle file, relative to the Pipe manifest's directory. The Greater shell resolves it via the same loader that ships the Bitcoin bundle in Task #4.

chunk_count.description: Total chunks in this bundle. Shown in the status panel; the runtime does not enforce it.

bias_distribution.description: Map of bias id → chunk count. Sum should equal chunk_count.

system_prompts.description: Map of bias id → system prompt text. Every entry in `bias_options` should have a corresponding prompt; missing entries fall back to a generic prompt at runtime.

signature.description: PGP signature metadata. Schema only — runtime treats every Pipe as 'Unsigned — local development build' for now.

signed_by.description: PGP key fingerprint of the signer, or null when unsigned.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at manifest authoring time.

author_notes.description: Free-form author notes shown in the Pipe status panel.
